svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="提现状态机" id="withdrawal-sm"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-162" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="提现六态状态机 + 重试三件套(防双花 / 防重打 / 反长事务)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="820" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="START" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e2e8f0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="申请" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="80" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PENDING" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="PENDING
待审核" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="220" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REJECTED" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="REJECTED
审核拒绝" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="220" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="APPROVED" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="APPROVED
审核通过(条件更新)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="430" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PROCESSING" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="PROCESSING
出款(乐观锁 attempt+1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="650" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SUCCESS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="SUCCESS
打款成功" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="680" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FAILED" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="FAILED
重试耗尽(max=3)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="680" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="余额校验 FOR UPDATE
SUCCESS 也计入已提现(防双花)

出款 HTTP 调用在事务外
(防长事务占连接)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="260" x="200" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="失败重试回退 APPROVED
attempt < 3
人工可 FAILED → APPROVED
(重置 attempt=0)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="200" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="START" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="PENDING"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="PENDING" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="REJECTED" value="拒绝"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="PENDING" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" target="APPROVED" value="通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="APPROVED" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="PROCESSING"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="PROCESSING" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" target="SUCCESS" value="成功"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="PROCESSING" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d4a017;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="APPROVED" value="失败 attempt<3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="PROCESSING" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" target="FAILED" value="耗尽"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E8" edge="1" parent="1" source="FAILED" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="APPROVED" value="人工重试"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
